name: llama-factory-unified-finetuning
description: Unified extensible framework for finetuning and inference of large language models
content:
## LLaMA-Factory: LLM Framework

### Core Concept

This skill implements techniques from paper arXiv:2512.04913 for improving agent reasoning, adaptation, and decision-making in complex tasks.

### Implementation

See paper for implementation details: https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.04913

### Practical Guidance

Key techniques from this paper can enhance agent capabilities in:
- Reasoning under uncertainty
- Adaptive learning
- Multi-step planning
- Robustness and generalization

Refer to the paper's methodology sections for specific implementation guidance.
